note: More servers being extracted. Full catalog coming soon.

servers.name: Just Publish
servers.description: Get your website online in seconds — just ask your AI assistant to publish it and Just Publish hands you a live link.

servers.name: Query Streams MCP
servers.description: Query Streams securely connects MCP clients to live databases through the Query Streams Cloud Network, with no VPNs, inbound ports, or complex setup.

servers.name: svgapp.ai MCP
servers.description: Hosted MCP server for generating SVG illustrations, icons, and brand mascots with svgapp.ai from MCP-compatible AI clients.

servers.name: Neo
servers.description: NEO MCP lets Claude Code, Cursor and VS Code hand off complex AI engineering tasks like AI model evals, AI agent optimization.

servers.name: Dawnguard
servers.description: Cloud security insights, guardrail guidance, and compliance checking via Dawnguard.

servers.name: Cron Scheduler MCP
servers.description: 7 tools for AI agent cron job scheduling with SQLite persistence, retry logic, and structured observability. MIT license.

servers.name: Sparda
servers.description: Turn any codebase into an MCP server with one command. Express & FastAPI → Claude-ready in 3 minutes.

servers.name: Universal Context Pipeline
servers.description: Local-first MCP server that indexes folders, PDFs, code, and past AI conversations — and exposes them as a single grounded-search tool. Runs fully offline.

servers.name: Alpha Vantage MCP
servers.description: Access financial market data: realtime & historical stock, ETF, options, forex, crypto, commodities, fundamentals, technical indicators.

servers.name: ROIC.AI Financial Data API
servers.description: Access ROIC.AI financial data from AI tools, including company financials, ratios, prices, transcripts, and market research data.

servers.name: Gainium
servers.description: Manage your crypto trading bots, deals, and backtests from your AI assistant.

servers.name: Webotee Amazon MCP
servers.description: Amazon brand, seller & niche intelligence — buy-box history, competing sellers, and under-competed niches.

servers.name: Mentionkit MCP
servers.description: AI first social listening tool with MCP support.

servers.name: Capafy
servers.description: On Capafy, your Skill runs online 24/7 as an agent product, and you get paid every time someone uses it.

servers.name: Bluesky MCP
servers.description: A remote MCP server for Bluesky social media platform.

servers.name: Bright Data
servers.description: Discover, extract, and interact with the web - one interface powering automated access across the public internet.

servers.name: Talordata MCP
servers.description: Get structured search results from Google, Bing, Yandex, DuckDuckGo, and more through one simple API.

servers.name: StrajkPolski MCP
servers.description: MCP server for the public API of StrajkPolski.
